data.content: Plan reviewed and approved. Approach of appending worktree hint at CLI error-render time (main.rs:82-84) is correct — keeps AppError::NotFound Display impl unchanged, adds hint only when repo_root and argv context are available. Test strategy covers positive (multiple not-found paths) and negative (unrelated error) cases. Minor note for implementer: repo_root is reliably available since most NotFound errors occur after context resolution (main.rs:154). Ready for implementation.
